commit_message:
[ujson] Fix module identifier serialization [ujson] Fix module identifier serialization 1. Fix potential `filename` out of bound access.  Although it's rarely to have filename's length be less than three, we don't have this kind of check.
2. Fix status serialization/deserialization inconsistency. Although it's rarely to have the module identifier contains "\\" character, we still want to serialize the module identifier properly in this case.
